summary: Big week: Opus 4.6 launched with 1M context, Claude Code gets security enhancements

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6 now available with 1M context window
items.summary: Anthropic's new flagship model brings 1M token context and faster output. Available on all plans including Free (limited), Pro, and Max.

items.title: Claude now available as desktop app on Mac and Windows
items.summary: Claude Code is now available as a standalone desktop application, making it easier to use outside the browser.

sections.title: Developer Tools and Tips and Tricks

items.title: Claude Code security enhancements: sandboxed execution
items.summary: Claude Code now runs in a sandboxed environment by default, preventing accidental file system damage. Tip: use the permission mode settings to customize access.

items.title: MCP server support expanded with 12 new integrations
items.summary: Model Context Protocol now supports Slack, GitHub, Jira, Linear, and 8 more services. Connect your tools directly to Claude.

items.title: Anthropic Academy launches free prompt engineering course
items.summary: A new self-paced course covering prompt engineering fundamentals, from basic techniques to advanced chain-of-thought strategies.

items.title: Anthropic publishes updated Responsible Scaling Policy
items.summary: The updated policy adds new evaluation criteria for frontier models and clearer deployment thresholds. This may affect how Claude responds to certain edge-case prompts.

items.title: Claude Projects: shared workspaces coming to Teams plan
items.summary: Anthropic previewed collaborative project workspaces where team members can share Claude conversations, custom instructions, and uploaded files.
